introSection: Journey to the Stars (Chinese: 十一环过山车) was a steel roller coaster at Jinling Happy World. It is the first of the 11 Inversion Roller Coaster models manufactured by Hebei Zhongye Metallurgical Equipment Manufacturing.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Images discovered on Weibo in June 2014 suggest the ride was never built and previously lied in storage. The park has since been demolished.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: It is very similar to Colossus at Thorpe Park, manufactured by Intamin.

fullText:
Journey to the Stars (Chinese: 十一环过山车) was a steel roller coaster at Jinling Happy World. It is the first of the 11 Inversion Roller Coaster models manufactured by Hebei Zhongye Metallurgical Equipment Manufacturing.

Images discovered on Weibo in June 2014 suggest the ride was never built and previously lied in storage. The park has since been demolished.

It is very similar to Colossus at Thorpe Park, manufactured by Intamin.
